Randwick - Saturday, 4 April 2026

Race 1 - 1:25 am Widden Kindergarten Stakes (1100m)

Total prize: Prize $250000. No class restriction, Set Weights, Two-Years-Old, No sex restriction, Set Weights & Penalties

Tips: 2 3 9 1 7 4 Thin form race with not a lot to go on. UNDER FOCUS won last start to break maiden at Kensington on a soft track and has had a flying start to their career, big chance. THE NEXT EPISODE last start winner to break maiden at Warwick Farm on a soft track when resuming and placed at trial since last race 24 days ago, not without each-way claims. ARYAAM was narrowly beaten as a favourite at only start at Warwick Farm on a soft track and trained at an astute stable, each-way claims. ARTANEOUS comes back to race in the city on a Saturday and trained at an astute stable, could threaten.

Stewards
Official steward comments.
Stewards: Bumped on the hindquarter on jumping. Rdr std the colt travelled well outside the lead & he anticipated it would extend when pressured in the straight, however when placed under pressure near the 200m it gave no response & was disappointing, & on pulling up it made an abnormal respiratory noise. A post-race vet exam revealed the colt to be slow to recover. Tnr confirmed the colt was making an abnormal noise post-race, which might be consistent with it having displaced its palate. Tnr subsequently reported a 0 horse(s) from this race have won since.

Official steward comments.
Stewards: Bumped on jumping, then shifted in and made contact. Rdr rpt after making contact on jumping his mnt did not stretch out in early stages. A post-race vet exam revealed the colt to be lame (2/5) in the near-foreleg and to be slow to recover. Stable rep was advised a vet clearance will be required prior to next trial/race. Vet clearance since received. 2 horse(s) from this race have won since.
